title: Pibby Takeover (Corruption)
description: Adds a corruption that takes over your game. Heavily inspired by "Learning with pibby". I spent countless hours working on it so a download is greatly appreciated! :D
body:
# PIBBY TAKEOVER
## [FLASHING LIGHT WARNING]

![wow goobye dirt hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13527a60affc5c6b52a729dab38630fd61b40cbb.png)
 
A mod that adds a **_corruption_** which slowly takes over your world. The mod is heavily inspired from "Learning with Pibby". The glitch in question is a form of sentient block that spreads itself and **consumes** your world. During the night, **corrupted characters** attempt to make you one of them. Some of these characters seem familliar, like you've seen them all those years ago... The mod is MEANT to be played with other mods like guns, so you can have a better chance at survival!

![Corrupted Vindicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bb67b1ea687d5f06f3f23288815a2c85915a5f9.png)


If you like survival horror experiences, definitely give this mod a try! I spent countless hours working away so a download would be appreciated! :D  

Bit of lore: This mod takes place in the far future, 3032 to be exact.

CREDITS: Adult Swim, And All youtubers in mod

## BUT WAIT!
I am totally fine with you playing my mod in a youtube video. But if you do, please, please, PLEASE credit me and put the link in the description. Thank you :)
